sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.name: description
sub_fields.default_value:
At growth[period], we follow best practices to ensure that our clients are developing proposals
that distinguish them in the competitive federal contracting landscape. Our industry-leading
capture team prepares our clients for success at every point of the contracting phase,
maximizing your potential and helping you to secure their next big win. Our motto is Analyze,
Strategize, Action, & Success.

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.name: description
sub_fields.default_value: growth[period] and GW Group have entered into a strategic partnership, allowing both companies to combine their unique strengths, resources, and expertise to create improved customer experiences. GW Group is a public affairs firm offering government relations and communications solutions for clients across Canada. GW Group is a results-oriented firm that connects clients to the right people with the right message - ensuring that clients have a seat at the table. growth[period]'s Canadian practice supports clients at every stage, whether the client is a high-growth start-up, a late-stage company preparing for a transaction, or multinational public company. The partnership is intended to support companies ranging from those with no, or limited, business development resources, to those with well-established growth or transaction teams. growth[period] will now have an office in Toronto serving clients across Canada and GW Group will now have an office in the Washington, DC region serving clients across the United States.
